description: Poster built on a vintage early-1900s photochrom colorized photograph of the Statue of Liberty in New York Harbor, with teal-green water and sky and the warm-toned statue and star-fort base. At top is a small white White House line-engraving, beneath which large white serif capitals read 'WORTH PROTECTING'. A small white caption at lower-right reads 'Statue of Liberty, New-York Harbor, 1905'. The accompanying tweet text refers to 'a beacon of freedom, hope & the American spirit'.
notable_text: WORTH PROTECTING / Statue of Liberty, New-York Harbor, 1905
